title: iam_access_key
description: One programmatic credential / access key — one record per AWS IAM access key, GCP service account key, or Azure service principal credential. Policies check age, last-use, and active-but-never-used states.

id.description: Unique key identifier (AWS: access key ID, GCP: key ID).

user_id.description: Identifier of the user or service account that owns this key.

is_active.description: Key is currently active and usable for authentication.

age_days.description: Number of days since key was created.

last_used_days.description: Number of days since the key was last used. Omitted when the key has never been used (see never_used).

never_used.description: Key has never been used for any API call since creation.
